findings.title: External evidence placeholder remains
findings.impact: The bundle can compile for pre-lab use, but this field must be replaced or backed by accepted authority evidence for certification closure.
findings.suggestion: Attach the lab, scheme, L1, device, PCI/PED, or acquirer evidence and update this field with the accepted reference.

findings.title: Fixture signing secret is still present
findings.impact: The checked-in fixture key is deterministic and must never protect production or certification submissions.
findings.suggestion: Generate and custody a submission-specific trust anchor outside the repository fixture.

findings.title: Bundle compiled and authenticated
findings.impact: The same kernel binary can load this data bundle under the selected policy.
findings.suggestion: Keep the bundle, trust anchors, fingerprints, reports, and submitted binary hash together in the certification pack.

capability_coverage.role: Selects PSE/PPSE, matches configured AIDs, and keeps scheme choice data-driven.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add at least one scheme profile with AID entries for each claimed interface.

capability_coverage.role: Binds contact interface, contact kernel type, TAC/IAC, DOL, CVM, TRM, and scripts to profile data.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add contact to the claimed interfaces and include contact AID/profile material with contact_kernel_type.

capability_coverage.role: Binds contactless scope to C-8 package data, TTQ/CVM limits, relay resistance, and masked traces.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add a contactless kernel registry entry and contactless AID profile data for every claimed scheme.

capability_coverage.role: Supplies RID/index public keys, expiry, checksums, and provenance for ODA validation.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Attach accepted CAPK material with checksums and authority provenance.

capability_coverage.role: Binds cryptographic vector evidence and CDA request behavior to bundle hashes.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Attach lab or scheme ODA vectors and bind their hash in artifact_hashes.

capability_coverage.role: Controls CVM limits, CDCVM support, extension codes, and PED-owned offline PIN behavior.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add CVM limits, certified CVM code handling, and PED integration evidence.

capability_coverage.role: Drives floor limits, random selection, transaction type limits, and offline counters from profile data.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add floor limits, random selection settings, and offline counter bounds for the target schemes.

capability_coverage.role: Keeps TAC/IAC policy in signed profile data rather than compiled constants.
Defines which issuer script INS values are critical for post-authorization handling.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add critical issuer script INS policy for each scheme profile that requires it.

capability_coverage.role: Controls contactless relay resistance behavior where required by scheme/profile.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add relay resistance parameters for contactless profiles that claim it.

capability_coverage.role: Sets APDU, host authorization, PIN entry, and contactless UI callback bounds from bundle data.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Keep timeout values within 1..60000 ms and document device-specific rationale.

capability_coverage.role: Authenticates bundle payloads, enforces rollback counters, and records verification status.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Use authority-managed trust anchors and keep rollback counters monotonic.

capability_coverage.role: Binds target device, firmware, interface, and L1 approval references to the bundle.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Replace pre-lab placeholders with accepted L1/device references.

capability_coverage.role: Records PED/PIN custody evidence for CVM and offline PIN integration.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Replace pre-lab placeholders with PCI PTS or assessor evidence references.

capability_coverage.role: Captures contact/contactless target versions and bulletin inclusions/exclusions as data.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Add accepted standards and bulletin reconciliation data.

capability_coverage.role: Binds test plan, artifact hashes, fingerprints, and report pack outputs for reproducible submissions.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Bind every external report, trace pack, vector set, profile, and submitted binary by hash.

capability_coverage.role: Requires masked APDU traces and prevents sensitive data from becoming report content.
capability_coverage.suggestion: Use the repository masking policy and audit trace packs before submission.
